title: Bangladesh wins two silver, ten bronze at IMSO 2025 — every team member medals on debut.
excerpt: Bangladesh made a remarkable debut at IMSO in Malaysia, earning two silver and ten bronze medals from 23 competing nations. The team was also named Best Cooperative Team and runner-up in the STEM Exploration Competition.

title: Bangladesh hosts its first-ever maths and science olympiad for primary students.
excerpt: The national round was held on August 22 at St. Joseph Higher Secondary School, with over 200 students competing. A total of 52 students were awarded medals across mathematics and science.

title: BdMSO 2025 national round: a talent show for primary students at St. Joseph.
excerpt: Over 200 students participated in the national round at St. Joseph Higher Secondary School on Friday, competing in mathematics and science.
